description: This Java class is a Spring Boot REST controller for authentication endpoints such as registration, login, email verification, and resend verification. It handles HTTP requests related to user authentication flows and utilizes an AuthService to perform core operations.

classes.name: AuthController
classes.description: Spring REST controller managing authentication-related HTTP endpoints such as registration, login, email verification, and resending verification emails.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Handles user registration, initiating email verification process.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Handles user login, validating credentials and email verification status.

methods.name: resendVerification
methods.description: Resends email verification link to unverified users.

methods.name: verify
methods.description: Completes account verification using a token from email link.

methods.name: extractIp
methods.description: Extracts client IP address from HttpServletRequest, considering proxies.
